name: node-clone-deep
title: node-clone-deep
description:
Recursively (deep) clone JavaScript native types
This module allows one to recursively (deep) clone JavaScript native types,
like Object, Array, RegExp, Date as well as primitives.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-clone-deep because Recursively (deep) clone JavaScript native types.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-clone-deep as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-clone-deep with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-clone-deep --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
